name: Alabama Heating, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Contractors License Lookup

agency.name: Alabama Board of Heating, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Contractors

termsReviewNotes: The linked vendor privacy policy is not a grant of record-reuse rights; redistribution remains unknown.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Alabama HVAC, Refrigeration, Duct Air Tightness Testing, apprentice, and emergency credentials exposed by the board lookup
knownExclusions: Plumbing and gas-fitting credentials are regulated by the Alabama PGFB and tracked separately.
General contractor, electrical, local permit, and municipal registration records are outside this source entry.
Sheet-metal coverage is limited to work within the board's heating, air-conditioning, refrigeration, and duct scope.
The public lookup requires a verification code and is not approved for automation.
rateLimitNotes: Manual use only. Do not bypass or automate the public verification-code control.
publicRecordsNotes: Official HVAC and refrigeration lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a credential or authorization does not exist.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed; the public lookup is verification-code protected.
researchNotes: The board's public lookup exposes HVAC, refrigeration, duct-testing, apprentice, and emergency credential types. Its consumer page links the lookup as the official path to find a licensed contractor.
maintainerNotes: Keep this as a manual handoff. The verification-code control must not be bypassed.

researchEvidence.note: The official board consumer page links its Find a Licensed Contractor lookup and describes board jurisdiction over contractor complaints.
The official linked portal lists HVAC, refrigeration, duct-testing, apprentice, and emergency license types and requires a verification-code image.

blocker.summary: The official public lookup requires a verification code; OpenTrade will not bypass or automate that technical control.
